title: Welcome to Blaze
content: Welcome to Blaze, an evolution of Synapser! We're excited to have you on board as we embark on this new journey together. Blaze is designed to enhance your experience with improved features and a fresh interface. Stay tuned for more updates and enjoy exploring all that Blaze has to offer!

title: Update about the future
content: couple of days ago, i decided to make a major overhaul with the v2.5.0, with alot of changes.But since that, i decided to switch platform from WPF to Brazor as a framework, meaning everything has to be build from the ground up. The work has had some good progress, but this one might literally take weeks. its a major update, and will be the v3.0.0 update. Stay tuned.
